# DirectorioLocal CR ‚Äî GitHub Copilot Instructions

Hyperlocal services directory for Costa Rica. Launches with a single district; architecture supports every canton/district in the country from day one.

## Stack
- **Frontend**: Astro 6 + Alpine.js (SSG-first, SEO-first, no heavy JS frameworks)
- **Database**: Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + Storage + auto-generated API)
- **Hosting**: Vercel (deploy via git push)
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS
- **Language**: TypeScript strict

## Key architecture
- URLs: `/{canton}/{district}/{category}` ‚Äî e.g. `/cartago/san-nicolas/fontaneria`
- Multi-tenancy by data, NOT by code ‚Äî one deploy serves all of CR, filtered by `canton_id`/`district_id`
- No custom backend: typed Supabase JS client for reads; mutations via Astro Actions
- SEO-first: Astro generates static HTML for canton/district/category/provider pages
- `LocalBusiness` schema with `areaServed` for hyperlocal AI overview matching (2026 best practice)

## Project structure
```
src/
  pages/           # Routes ‚Äî kebab-case, [param].astro for dynamic
    index.astro
    [canton]/index.astro
    [canton]/[distrito]/index.astro
    [canton]/[distrito]/[categoria].astro
    proveedor/[id].astro
    api/           # External webhooks only
  components/
    ui/            # Button, Card, Badge, Input
    directory/     # ProviderCard, CategoryGrid, SearchBar
    seo/           # JsonLd, OpenGraph, Breadcrumbs
  layouts/         # BaseLayout, DirectoryLayout, ProviderLayout
  lib/
    supabase.ts    # Singleton typed client
    queries/       # One file per domain ‚Äî providers.ts, categories.ts, geography.ts
    seo/           # JSON-LD generators
    slug.ts
    logger.ts
  actions/index.ts # Astro Actions (Zod-validated mutations)
  types/database.types.ts  # Generated by supabase gen types ‚Äî never hand-edit
  env.d.ts
```

Path aliases in `tsconfig.json`:
- `@components/*` ‚Üí `./src/components/*`
- `@layouts/*` ‚Üí `./src/layouts/*`
- `@lib/*` ‚Üí `./src/lib/*`
- `@types/*` ‚Üí `./src/types/*`
- `@actions/*` ‚Üí `./src/actions/*`

## Data model
- `cantons` (id, name, slug)
- `districts` (id, canton_id, name, slug)
- `categories` (id, name, slug, icon_emoji)
- `providers` (id, name, phone, whatsapp, email, description, photo_url, district_id, **owner_id** uuid REFERENCES auth.users, verified, created_at)
- `provider_categories` (provider_id, category_id) ‚Äî N:N
- `reviews` (id, provider_id, author_id, rating, comment, created_at)

RLS enabled on every table. `providers` readable when `verified = true`; writes gated to `auth.uid() = owner_id`.

## Core conventions (apply everywhere)
- Slugs: kebab-case, no accents ‚Äî use `toSlug` from `@lib/slug`
- Every Supabase query lives in `src/lib/queries/<domain>.ts` ‚Äî never inline in `.astro`
- Every `providers` query filters by `district_id` minimum
- No `select('*')` ‚Äî list columns explicitly
- No `console.log` in production ‚Äî use `logger` from `@lib/logger`
- Mutations go through Astro Actions in `src/actions/`, not API routes
- Provider images in Supabase Storage bucket `provider-photos`
- `PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL` and `PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY` in `.env`; `SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY` Vercel-only, never committed
- Never hardcode canton, district, or category IDs
- No `../../../` chains ‚Äî always use path aliases

## Instruction files (apply automatically by file type)
Detailed rules are in `.github/instructions/`:
- `architecture.instructions.md` ‚Äî full architecture rationale (applies to all files)
- `astro.instructions.md` ‚Äî Astro 6 rules (applies to `**/*.astro, astro.config.mjs`)
- `multi-district.instructions.md` ‚Äî multi-tenancy invariants (applies to all files)
- `supabase.instructions.md` ‚Äî Supabase query/auth/storage rules (applies to `src/lib/**`)
- `astro-patterns.instructions.md` ‚Äî copyable Astro code patterns
- `astro-seo.instructions.md` ‚Äî SEO templates and JSON-LD patterns
- `cr-geo.instructions.md` ‚Äî Costa Rica geography and slug conventions
- `supabase-patterns.instructions.md` ‚Äî Supabase query/storage code patterns

## Prompts (run from Chat with / or prompt picker)
- `/add-provider` ‚Äî guide to add a provider manually or via SQL
- `/deploy-check` ‚Äî pre-deploy checklist
- `/new-district` ‚Äî add a new canton/district to the system

## Agents (custom modes in Copilot)
- `code-reviewer` ‚Äî security, SEO, convention review before commit
- `db-architect` ‚Äî schema, migrations, RLS, indexes, type generation
- `frontend-dev` ‚Äî Astro components, pages, layouts, Tailwind UI
- `seo-agent` ‚Äî meta tags, JSON-LD, sitemaps, local search optimization

## Checks
- Build: `npm run build`
- Dev: `npm run dev`
- Types after schema change: `npm run db:types`
